understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to solve each level by getting every selectable piece onto the goal tiles marked with '+' so that all goals are occupied simultaneously, which triggers a WIN and progresses toward completing the full KA59 run.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: The game played on a grid with obstacles/walls that block movement; MOVE_* attempted to shift the currently selected piece one tile in that direction but had no effect if blocked. CLICK actions targeted specific coordinates and either moved the selected piece to that location when the move was valid/clear, or did nothing when the destination was blocked/illegal; effective play required choosing which piece to move (by clicking piece positions/targets) and positioning pieces so all '+' tiles were covered at the same time within the step limit.

history.summary: Level 1 attempt 2/2 failed after 64 turns. No attempts remaining.
Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to solve each level by getting every selectable piece onto the goal tiles marked with '+' so that all goals are occupied simultaneously, which triggers a WIN and progresses toward completing the full KA59 run.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: The game played on a grid with obstacles/walls that block movement; MOVE_* attempted to shift the currently selected piece one tile in that direction but had no effect if blocked. CLICK actions targeted specific coordinates and either moved the selected piece to that location when the move was valid/clear, or did nothing when the destination was blocked/illegal; effective play required choosing which piece to move (by clicking piece positions/targets) and positioning pieces so all '+' tiles were covered at the same time within the step limit.
